name: Image Label
description: Add whatever image you want while playing

image.name: Image (gif, png, jpg, jpeg, webp)
image.description: Your image. Whatever size or resolution you want

pbutton.name: Settings in pause menu
pbutton.description: Show a button to change the settings in the pause menu

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: The scale you want your image to be

posx.name: Position (X)
posx.description: How far right or left you want your image to be

posy.name: Position (Y)
posy.description: How high you want your image to be

opacity.name: Opacity
opacity.description: How transparent you want your image to be

rotation.name: Rotation
rotation.description: How many degrees you want your image to be rotated
